Title: Home page loads successfully
Description: Verify the home page renders with title and key sections
Steps:
1. Navigate to baseURL
2. Wait for page to load
Expected Result: Page title is 'Automation Exercise' and header carousel and features-items section are visible

Title: Top navigation links visible
Description: Verify all top nav items present
Steps: 1. Inspect top navigation
Expected Result: Links visible: Home Products Cart Signup / Login Test Cases API Testing Video Tutorials Contact us

Title: Subscription email submission
Description: Verify newsletter subscription accepts a valid email
Steps:
1. Scroll to footer
2. Enter a valid email in Subscription
3. Click the arrow submit button
Expected Result: Success message 'You have been successfully subscribed!' appears

Title: Subscription with invalid email
Description: Verify rejection of invalid email format
Steps:
1. Scroll to footer
2. Enter 'notanemail' in Subscription
3. Click submit
Expected Result: Form does not submit (browser email validation) and no success message shown

Title: Scroll to top arrow returns to top
Description: Verify floating scroll-up control
Steps:
1. Scroll to the bottom of the page
2. Click the scroll-up arrow
Expected Result: Page scrolls back to the top

Title: Register account with valid data
Description: Verify a new account can be created end-to-end
Steps:
1. Enter name and unique email under 'New User Signup!'
2. Click Signup
3. Fill account details on the next form (title gender password DOB address country mobile etc.)
4. Click Create Account
5. On 'Account Created!' click Continue
Expected Result: User is signed up; 'Logged in as <name>' appears in header

Title: Signup with existing email
Description: Verify duplicate-email registration is blocked
Preconditions: An email already used to register
Steps:
1. Enter any name and the existing email under 'New User Signup!'
2. Click Signup
Expected Result: Error 'Email Address already exist!' is displayed

Title: Signup with empty fields
Description: Verify required fields are enforced
Steps:
1. Leave Name and Email empty
2. Click Signup
Expected Result: Browser validation prevents submission; form stays on page

Title: Signup with invalid email format
Description: Verify email field validates format
Steps:
1. Enter name 'Tester' and email 'invalidemail'
2. Click Signup
Expected Result: Native browser validation blocks submission; user remains on signup section

Title: Login with valid credentials
Description: Verify a registered user can log in
Steps:
1. Open Signup/Login page
2. Under 'Login to your account' enter registered email and password
3. Click Login
Expected Result: User is redirected to home and 'Logged in as <name>' is visible in header

Title: Login with invalid password
Description: Verify wrong password is rejected
Steps:
1. Enter valid email and wrong password
2. Click Login
Expected Result: Error 'Your email or password is incorrect!' is displayed

Title: Login with unregistered email
Description: Verify unknown email is rejected
Steps:
1. Enter 'noone@example.com' and any password
2. Click Login
Expected Result: Error 'Your email or password is incorrect!' is displayed

Title: Login with empty fields
Description: Verify both fields required
Steps:
1. Leave email and password blank
2. Click Login
Expected Result: Browser validation prevents submission; user remains on the page

Title: Logout
Description: Verify a logged-in user can log out
Steps: 1. Click 'Logout' in header
Expected Result: User is redirected to the Signup/Login page and 'Logged in as' is no longer shown

Title: Delete account
Description: Verify a user can delete their account
Steps: 1. Click 'Delete Account' in header
Expected Result: Page 'Account Deleted!' is shown and Continue returns to home unauthenticated

Title: All Products page loads
Description: Verify product listing renders
Steps: 1. Click 'Products' in nav
Expected Result: All Products heading and a grid of product cards are displayed

Title: View product details
Description: Verify product detail page
Steps: 1. Click 'View Product' on the first card
Expected Result: Product detail page shows name category price availability condition brand and quantity input

Title: Search product returns results
Description: Verify product search works for an existing term
Steps:
1. Enter 'top' in #search_product
2. Click #submit_search
Expected Result: Searched Products heading appears and at least one matching product is shown

Title: Search with no matches
Description: Verify empty-result handling
Steps:
1. Enter 'zzzzznosuchitem' in search
2. Submit
Expected Result: Searched Products section is empty or shows an appropriate no-result indication

Title: Search with empty query
Description: Verify empty search behavior
Steps:
1. Clear search input
2. Click search button
Expected Result: Either all products remain or an empty 'Searched Products' section is shown — no error

Title: Search special characters sanitized
Description: Verify special characters do not break the search
Steps:
1. Enter '<script>alert(1)</script>' in search
2. Submit
Expected Result: Input is treated as text no JS executes and the page does not crash

Title: Add product to cart from listing
Description: Verify Add to Cart on a product card
Steps:
1. Hover the first card
2. Click 'Add to cart'
3. Click 'Continue Shopping' in the modal
Expected Result: Cart counter / modal confirms the item was added

Title: View cart shows added product
Description: Verify cart page lists items
Preconditions: An item has been added to cart
Steps: 1. Click 'Cart' in nav
Expected Result: Cart page lists the added product with image name price quantity and total

Title: Update quantity from product detail then view in cart
Description: Verify quantity is preserved
Steps:
1. Set quantity to 4
2. Click 'Add to cart'
3. Click 'View Cart'
Expected Result: Cart page shows the product with quantity 4 and matching total

Title: Remove product from cart
Description: Verify items can be removed
Preconditions: At least one item in cart
Steps: 1. On Cart page click the × delete button next to the item
Expected Result: Item is removed and cart shows 'Cart is empty!' if it was the last item

Title: Empty cart message
Description: Verify empty-cart state
Steps: 1. Navigate to /view_cart
Expected Result: Page shows 'Cart is empty!' message

Title: Add same product twice merges quantity
Description: Verify duplicate adds increment qty
Steps:
1. Set quantity to 1 and Add to cart
2. Continue Shopping
3. Add the same product again
4. View Cart
Expected Result: Cart shows the product once with quantity 2

Title: Proceed to checkout requires login
Description: Verify checkout flow gates unauthenticated users
Preconditions: Cart has at least one item; not logged in
Steps: 1. On Cart page click Proceed To Checkout
Expected Result: Modal prompts to Register / Login before continuing to checkout

Title: Checkout shows address and review
Description: Verify address and order review appear
Preconditions: User logged in with items in cart
Steps:
1. Open Cart
2. Click Proceed To Checkout
Expected Result: Address Details and Review Your Order sections are visible with delivery/billing address and product summary

Title: Place order with valid card
Description: Verify the order is placed and confirmation shown
Steps:
1. Add a comment in the message box
2. Click Place Order
3. Enter Name on Card valid card number CVC expiry MM and YYYY
4. Click 'Pay and Confirm Order'
Expected Result: 'Order Placed!' confirmation page is displayed

Title: Place order with empty card details
Description: Verify card form validates required fields
Steps: 1. Click 'Pay and Confirm Order' without filling card fields
Expected Result: Form does not submit; required field validation prevents payment

Title: Submit contact form successfully
Description: Verify Contact Us submission with file upload
Steps:
1. Fill Name Email Subject Message
2. Attach any small file via 'Choose File'
3. Click Submit and accept browser confirm
Expected Result: Success banner 'Success! Your details have been submitted successfully.' appears

Title: Contact form requires fields
Description: Verify validation of required fields
Steps:
1. Leave fields blank
2. Click Submit
Expected Result: Browser validation blocks submission

Title: Test Cases page renders list
Description: Verify Test Cases informational page loads
Steps: 1. Click 'Test Cases' in nav
Expected Result: Test Cases heading and an enumerated list of test cases are visible

Title: API List page renders
Description: Verify API Testing reference page loads
Steps: 1. Click 'API Testing' in nav
Expected Result: 'APIs List for practice' page is shown with API endpoints

Title: Responsive layout on mobile viewport
Description: Verify the site adapts to mobile width
Steps:
1. Resize viewport to 375x812
2. Navigate to home
Expected Result: Layout reflows; no horizontal scrollbar; main content visible

Title: No broken images on home
Description: Verify all images load on the home page
Steps: 1. Inspect all img elements for naturalWidth > 0
Expected Result: No broken images (every image has naturalWidth > 0)

Title: XSS in product search is sanitized
Description: Verify reflected XSS is not executed
Steps: 1. Submit '' in product search
Expected Result: No JS dialog fires and no injected element appears in the DOM

Title: SQL injection attempt in login is rejected
Description: Verify auth resists trivial SQLi payloads
Steps:
1. Enter '' OR 1=1 -- in email and password
2. Click Login
Expected Result: Login is rejected with the normal 'email or password is incorrect' message and no SQL error is exposed

Title: Signup with very long name
Description: Verify input length is handled
Steps:
1. Enter a 300-character name and a unique email
2. Click Signup
Expected Result: Either the form rejects the input gracefully or accepts it without breaking the layout
